summary: The causal chain is fully present in the evidence but rate-limit distractor lines are incorrectly labelled as 'trigger', and the final user-visible outcome (health probe 503) is absent from the evidence set.
improvements: Remove rate-limit-exceeded lines from evidence — they are pre-incident distractors with no causal link to the DB failure
Add the health probe 503 line (line 31) as a 'consequence' to complete the user-visible impact
